seo.default_title: Eureka Automation | Custom Machines & Industrial Robotics
seo.default_description: Leading System Integrator (SI) and OEM in Thailand. We specialize in custom machine building, industrial robotics, and turnkey automation solutions to reduce manufacturing costs and boost productivity.
seo.keywords: Custom Machine Builder Thailand, OEM Automation, System Integrator, Industrial Robotics, Automation Solutions, Cost Reduction Manufacturing, Turnkey Automation
seo.careers_description: Join our team of automation and robotics pioneers. We are looking for passionate individuals to shape the future of industrial technology.
seo.services_description: Comprehensive automation design, CNC machining, and PLC programming services.
seo.solutions_description: Smart logistics solutions featuring AMR, AGV, and intelligent warehouse management.
seo.products_description: Custom-built machines and standardized units for high-efficiency manufacturing.
seo.contact_description: Consult with our automation experts for your industrial needs today.
seo.blog_description: Stay updated with the latest trends in manufacturing technology and automation.

about.title: A Decade of Engineering Precision
about.overview_desc: Since 2010, Eureka Automation has been a trusted partner in designing and manufacturing innovative industrial solutions for global leaders in the Automotive and Electronics sectors.
about.comprehensive_services: Our comprehensive services include requirement analysis, mechanical/electrical design, CNC machining, PLC programming, and complete machine assembly.
about.professionalism_subtitle: We provide comprehensive machinery and industrial automation solutions.
about.professionalism_desc: Eureka Automation is a leader in Thailand's mechatronics engineering sector, serving thousands of clients both locally and globally. Our expert engineering team delivers custom machine designs and automation systems tailored to boost production efficiency and minimize operational costs, ensuring our clients achieve maximum value from our expertise.

industrialTrust.title: INDUSTRIAL TRUST
industrialTrust.description: Eureka Automation is a premier System Integrator (SI) specializing in smart manufacturing design. Founded in 2014 as a dedicated automation entity (rooted since 2002), we bridge the gap between mechanical engineering and digital intelligence.

showcase.title: Our Showcase & Activities
showcase.description: Experience our innovations and solutions through real-world demonstration videos.

home.transform_desc: Empower your manufacturing ecosystem with smart, data-driven automation frameworks designed for longevity.

foodpack2026.title: Showcases Smart Food Manufacturing Solutions at Food Pack Asia 2026
foodpack2026.desc: Revolutionizing the Food Industry: Eureka Automation’s Highlights from Food Pack Asia 2026 at BITEC Bangna
content: Revolutionizing the Food Industry: Eureka Automation’s Highlights from Food Pack Asia 2026

Eureka Automation recently marked another successful milestone by participating in Food Pack Asia 2026 at BITEC Bangna. As the food industry moves towards a more digital and automated era, we were proud to showcase our latest innovations designed to enhance productivity and food safety.

This year, our exhibit focused on bridging the gap between traditional food processing and advanced industrial automation, providing solutions that meet international hygiene and efficiency standards.
Booth Highlights:
GRID:/images/news/foodpack2026/2.webp,/images/news/foodpack2026/3.webp,/images/news/foodpack2026/4.webp
• Food-Grade Robotics: Advanced robotic arms built specifically for food environments, ensuring zero contamination and high-speed handling.
• Automated Packaging Lines: Smart packaging solutions that maximize output while minimizing material waste.
• AI Vision Inspection: High-precision visual systems for quality control, capable of detecting defects and sorting products in real-time.
GRID:/images/news/foodpack2026/5.webp,/images/news/foodpack2026/6.webp

A heartfelt thank you to everyone who visited our booth to explore our technologies and share their business visions. We look forward to helping you transform your production line into a state-of-the-art facility.
"Empowering Food Production with Intelligence, Safety, and Scale."

Didn't get a chance to meet us? You can still explore our food-specific automation solutions on our Product Page or reach out to our technical team for a private consultation at contact@eurekaautomation.co.th.

expo2026.title: Showcases Cutting-Edge Smart Tech at Automation Expo 2026
expo2026.desc: Driving the Future of Innovation: Eureka Automation shines at the premier tech event in Nong Nooch Pattaya, showcasing Smart Manufacturing and AI-Integrated Robotics solutions designed to power your success.
content: Driving the Future of Innovation: Eureka Automation Shines at the Premier Tech Event
Recently, Eureka Automation proudly participated in the Automation Technology Exhibition held at the prestigious Nong Nooch Garden, Pattaya from Feb 25-27, 2026.
GRID:/images/news/expo2026/2.webp,/images/news/expo2026/3.webp,/images/news/expo2026/4.webp
Key Highlights from Our Booth:
• Smart Manufacturing Solutions: Real-world demonstrations of how smart systems optimize production cycles and ROI.
• AI-Integrated Robotics: Showcasing high-precision robotic arms powered by advanced AI for seamless industrial operations.
• Tailored Automation Consulting: Our experts provided one-on-one sessions to design bespoke automation roadmaps for various business scales.

We would like to extend our sincere gratitude to all visitors, partners, and clients who visited our booth. Your insights and interest drive us to continue pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in industrial automation.
"Beyond machinery, we deliver the solutions that power your success."
Missed us at the event? You can explore our full range of services and innovative technologies at our Product/Service page or contact our expert team today for a consultation.

careers.title: Forge Your Future With Us
careers.subtitle: Join a team of visionaries shaping the future of industrial intelligence. We are seeking passionate innovators to lead the next generation of automation.
careers.apply_desc: Submit your details and we'll get back to you soon.

positions.title: Electrical Design Engineer (1 Position)
positions.desc: Design and develop electrical control systems for industrial automation.
qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
At least 1 year of experience in PLC programming (Mitsubishi/Omron).
Design control systems for machinery (Pneumatics & Hydraulics).
Plan and design electrical circuits according to customer concepts.
Control costs and materials within the specified budget.
Prepare test plans and audits before delivering machinery to customers.
Prepare drawings, part lists, and machine manuals.
Provide customer service for machine-related issues.

positions.title: Mechanical Design Engineer (3 Positions)
positions.desc: Create detailed 3D designs and engineering drawings for custom-built industrial machines.
qualification: Bachelor degree in Mechanical Engineering.
Experience as a Mechanical engineer at least 3 years.
Knowledge of design and visualization software such as AutoCAD, Solid Work.
Advanced MS Office skills.
Control costs and design materials and equipment to stay within the specified budget.
Solid decision-making ability and leadership skills.
Good time management and organization skills.
Good command of both written and spoken English.

positions.title: Assembly Technician (2 Positions - Urgent)
positions.desc: Assemble and install industrial machinery components following engineering drawings.
qualification: Age 22 years and above.
Vocational Diploma (HVC) or higher.
Knowledge of technician tools.
Experience in machine assembly.
Can start work immediately (special consideration).
benefits: Job / Cost of living / Diligence allowance.

positions.title: CNC Technician (Urgent)
positions.desc: Operate and maintain CNC machines to produce high-precision industrial parts.
qualification: Age 22 years and above.
Completed military service.
No restriction on education background.
Experience in CNC operations.
Able to work shifts.
benefits: Job / Cost of living / Diligence allowance.

blog.title: Blog & Insights
blog.tag: Stay updated with the latest trends in industrial automation

industry40.title: What is Industrial Automation?
industry40.excerpt: Understanding the role of automation in enhancing modern manufacturing efficiency.

wms.title: Warehouse Management
wms.tag: Optimize your inventory with intelligent software.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.content_desc: Leverage advanced AI and Machine Learning to achieve high-ROI Predictive Maintenance, significantly reducing costly unplanned downtime. Optimize Quality Control to bring defect rates closer to zero while ensuring absolute precision. Our AI solutions transform raw factory data into actionable insights for intelligent production forecasting, giving procurement teams cost predictability and unmatched operational efficiency.

robotics.title: Advanced Robotics & Automation
robotics.content_desc: As a top-tier System Integrator (SI), we deliver comprehensive Turnkey Automation Solutions from concept to final commissioning. Whether deploying Industrial Robotic Arms, Collaborative Robots (Cobots), or automated conveyor and sorting systems, we help manufacturers overcome labor shortages, drastically cut long-term labor costs, and predictably boost production volume to meet your competitive targets head-on.

machines.title: Custom Industrial Machines
machines.content_desc: Operating as a dedicated OEM and Custom Machine Builder, we engineer highly specialized industrial machinery designed around your unique specifications. By combining precision engineering with robust operational design, we build custom solutions that eliminate production bottlenecks, reduce operational expenditure (OpEx), and guarantee a fast path to ROI for procurement and facility management teams.

logistics.title: Smart Logistics Solutions
logistics.content_desc: Transform your supply chain infrastructure with our integrated Smart Warehousing solutions. Combining cutting-edge Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMR), Automated Guided Vehicles (AGV), and robust Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), we eliminate costly human errors in material handling. Dramatically shrink overhead logistics costs while exponentially increasing throughput and inventory accuracy.

metadata.modal_title: Privacy Policy / นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัว

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data in compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Eureka Automation
seo.description: Our commitment to protecting your personal data and privacy rights.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content_1: Eureka Automation respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website or apply for a job with us.
intro.content_2: We comply with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) of Thailand to ensure your data is handled securely and transparently.

collection.title: Data We Collect
collection.desc: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together follows:

items.name: Identity Data (Name, Lastname)
items.device: Usage Data (How you use our website)

items.1: To evaluate your application for employment
items.2: To contact you regarding your application or inquiries
items.3: To improve our website and user experience

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.desc: Under the PDPA, you have rights regarding your personal data:

access.title: Right to Access
access.desc: You can request a copy of your personal data.

rectification.title: Right to Rectification
rectification.desc: You can request correction of inaccurate data.

erasure.title: Right to Erasure
erasure.desc: You can request deletion of your data when no longer necessary.

restriction.title: Right to Restriction
restriction.desc: You can request to restrict the processing of your data.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact our HR Department:
